message:
🐛 Fix Copilot detection to use assignableUsers API (#82)

* 🐛 Apply circuit breaker bypass to all helm/gitops hooks

Extend the direct fetch pattern to bypass the global circuit breaker
for all helm and gitops related hooks:

- useHelmReleases
- useHelmHistory
- useGitOpsDrifts

This ensures these hooks remain functional even when the circuit
breaker is triggered by other failing requests.

Note: There are ~36 other api.get() calls that could also be affected.
A proper fix would be per-endpoint circuit breakers instead of global.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Copilot detection to use assignableUsers API

The previous approach using suggestedActors only showed users who
had been active on the issue. Changed to use assignableUsers API
which includes all assignable bots for the repository.

Added fallback to global user lookup if assignableUsers doesn't
return the copilot-swe-agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
